title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Sunburn
description: Calendula officinalis tinctures contains triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and carotenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. The triterpenoid saponins in calendula have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to reduce redness and prevent infection in sunburned skin. The flavonoids, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, have antioxidant properties that neutralize free radicals and promote skin repair. The carotenoids, including lycopene, help protect...
